strengths: Technical breadth spanning 16+ years across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure engineering
Hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq (2025), demonstrating some builder fluency in agentic tooling
Open-source founder (GISCollective) and community contributor with conference speaking, showing external-facing technical engagement
concerns: AI expertise is superficial: the only AI-relevant work is six months of infrastructure tooling at a single small startup — no ML/AI products built at scale, no recognized standing in the field, no demonstrated track record advising on AI strategy

Career trajectory is firmly senior IC, not director-level: no evidence of strategic advisory, customer-facing influence at organizational scale, or inspiring others beyond local workshops — the role's core non-technical demands

Currently in a career gap since October 2025 with no advanced degree; role strongly prefers a Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and the candidate holds only bachelor's degrees (CS and Fine Arts)
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable senior generalist whose AI exposure amounts to six months of infrastructure tooling work at a single small startup — far short of the recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms this principal role demands. His career history shows consistent senior IC delivery across many stacks and languages but no evidence of director-level strategic advisory, customer-facing influence, or the organizational-scale inspiration the role centers on; the most senior title he holds is 'Staff Software Developer,' and even those roles were execution-focused. Combined with a current career gap, no advanced degree, and a body of work that is AI-adjacent at best, he is a weak fit for a position built around cloud and AI strategy leadership.
